testcase.name: test_03_create_credit_purchase_invoice
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:124: in test_03_create_credit_purchase_invoice assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create credit purchase: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create credit purchase: {"detail":"Invalid category 'Materials'. Must be one of: ['Modular Material', 'Hardware & Accessories', 'Factory / Job Work', 'Installation', 'Transportation / Logistics', 'Non-Modular Furniture', 'Site Expense']"} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_verify_liability_created_with_correct_amount
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:162: in test_05_verify_liability_created_with_correct_amount expected_liability = self.initial_remaining_liability + self.test_amount ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestCreditPurchaseDoublePostingFix' object has no attribute 'test_amount'

testcase.name: test_06_verify_liability_record_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:184: in test_06_verify_liability_record_exists if l.get("liability_id") == self.test_liability_id: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestCreditPurchaseDoublePostingFix' object has no attribute 'test_liability_id'

testcase.name: test_07_settle_liability_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:198: in test_07_settle_liability_payment "amount": self.test_amount, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestCreditPurchaseDoublePostingFix' object has no attribute 'test_amount'

testcase.name: test_08_verify_actual_cost_increased_after_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:226: in test_08_verify_actual_cost_increased_after_payment expected_actual_cost = self.initial_actual_cost + self.test_amount ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestCreditPurchaseDoublePostingFix' object has no attribute 'test_amount'

testcase.name: test_10_verify_liability_status_closed
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:263: in test_10_verify_liability_status_closed if l.get("liability_id") == self.test_liability_id: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestCreditPurchaseDoublePostingFix' object has no attribute 'test_liability_id'
